{"query":"WITH
    now() AS ts_now,
    ts_now - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AS ts_1h_ago,
    ts_now - INTERVAL 28 DAY AS ts_28d_ago,
    ts_now - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS ts_1d_ago,
    toHour(ts_now) AS curr_hour
SELECT
    r.id               AS restroom_id,
    b.name             AS building_name,
    f.name             AS floor,
    curr.current_count AS current_count,
    hist.avg_count     AS avg_count
FROM
(
    -- current traffic (last 1 hour)
    SELECT
        restroom_id,
        sum(entry_count) AS current_count
    FROM traffic_logs
    WHERE 1 = 1 AND timestamp >= toDateTime('2025-05-28 00:00:00') AND timestamp < toDateTime('2026-05-29 00:00:00') AND 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM user_facility_mappings AS m
            WHERE m.user_id = '313b6296-728c-4906-a2e7-a32149a250de'
              AND m.building_id = building_id AND m.restroom_id = restroom_id
        )
    
    GROUP BY restroom_id
) AS curr
LEFT JOIN
(
    -- historical average: last 28 days, same hour-of-day, excluding last 1 day
    SELECT
        restroom_id,
        avg(entry_count) AS avg_count
    FROM traffic_logs
    WHERE timestamp >= ts_28d_ago AND timestamp <  ts_1d_ago AND toHour(timestamp) = curr_hour AND 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM user_facility_mappings AS m
            WHERE m.user_id = '313b6296-728c-4906-a2e7-a32149a250de'
              AND m.building_id = building_id AND m.restroom_id = restroom_id
        )
    
    GROUP BY restroom_id
) AS hist
USING (restroom_id)
INNER JOIN restrooms r ON curr.restroom_id = r.id
INNER JOIN buildings b ON r.building_id = b.id
INNER JOIN floors f ON f.id = r.floor_id FORMAT JSON","user":"default","query_start_time":"2026-05-28 09:40:26"}
{"query":"SELECT
            s.id,
            s.sensor_type,
            s.last_reading,
            b.name AS building_name,
            f.name AS floor
        FROM sensors s
        INNER JOIN restrooms r ON s.restroom_id = r.id
        INNER JOIN buildings b ON r.building_id = b.id
        INNER JOIN floors f ON f.id = r.floor_id
        WHERE 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM user_facility_mappings AS m
            WHERE m.user_id = '313b6296-728c-4906-a2e7-a32149a250de'
              AND m.restroom_id = s.restroom_id
        )
     AND 
        EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM user_facility_mappings AS m
            WHERE m.user_id = '313b6296-728c-4906-a2e7-a32149a250de'
              AND m.building_id = r.building_id
        )
     AND s.status = 'offline' FORMAT JSON","user":"default","query_start_time":"2026-05-28 09:40:26"}

{"query":"
		SELECT count()
		FROM system.tables
		WHERE database = 'analytics'
		  AND name IN (
			'v_video_popularity_7d',
			'v_video_popularity_30d',
			'v_video_popularity_365d',
			'v_video_popularity_all'
		  )
	","user":"analytics_user","query_start_time":"2026-05-28 16:48:44"}
{"query":"
		SELECT
			countIf(name = 'video_id') AS canonical_video_id,
			countIf(name = 'view_count') AS canonical_view_count,
			countIf(name = 'avg_engagement') AS canonical_avg_engagement,
			countIf(name = 'vve.video_id') AS legacy_video_id,
			countIf(name = 'views') AS legacy_view_count,
			countIf(name = 'avg_eng') AS legacy_avg_eng
		FROM system.columns
		WHERE database = 'analytics'
		  AND table = 'v_video_popularity_30d'
	","user":"analytics_user","query_start_time":"2026-05-28 16:48:44"}
